name: chrYqh_size_polymorphism
description: Yqh+ / Yqh- size polymorphism: the Yq12 heterochromatin block (DYZ1 + DYZ2) varies in size from ~10 Mb (Yqh-) to ~40 Mb (Yqh+) across individuals. Largest size polymorphism of any human chromosome region. Largely benign. GRCh38 represents this as a gap; resolved in the T2T-Y (HG002) reference.

architecture.internal_structure: Long tandem arrays of DYZ1 (~3.6 kb HSat3-like monomer) and DYZ2 (TTCCA pentamer); extreme size polymorphism, ratio DYZ1:DYZ2 also varies; AT-rich, gene-poor.
